description: Machine-readable source of truth for the Glenmoor primary combat VFX batch workflow.

promptBlocks.globalPositive: isolated painterly tactical RPG visual effect, centered composition, readable silhouette, controlled particles, clean dark neutral backdrop, production-ready game effect plate, no text, no UI
promptBlocks.globalNegative: background scene, character body, unreadable particle fog, photoreal explosion, muddy glow cloud, off-center composition, text, watermark, border, logo
promptBlocks.sheetDirective: single centered combat effect plate, clean silhouette, restrained particles, readable at gameplay scale, no environment scene, no character body, no abstract color smear

primarySheets.descriptor: steel-toned impact flash with sharp center, restrained sparks, and crisp outer silhouette
radiant cast burst with controlled magical bloom, layered halo, and clean readable edge
ward pulse ring with looping aura, soft inner glow, and stable circular readability
wind-toned projectile burst with streaking motion, centered impact core, and clean directional flare
